  "scene_imagination": "Focus: robotic arm in right portion of frame gripping a peach, positioned near a tall white shelving unit in a cluttered lab/workshop space. name: spatial_relationship_0034
prompt: The robot dog moves to the right and positions itself on the right side of the human
json_upsampled_prompt:
{
  "scene_imagination": "Focus: man in black t-shirt and camo cargo pants standing on a paved path beside a white quadruped robot dog, both on a riverside walkway with lush green trees to the left.
